findings.title: Over-broad Capability Claims
findings.description: The skill claims to navigate and manage monorepo workspaces, find packages, resolve cross-package dependencies, and run commands across workspaces without specifying any tool restrictions. This could lead to over-broad capability claims and potential misuse.
findings.remediation: Specify the allowed tools in the YAML manifest to restrict the capabilities of the skill.

findings.title: Missing License and Compatibility Information
findings.description: The YAML manifest does not specify a license or compatibility information, which are important for understanding the legal and operational context of the skill.
findings.snippet:
license: Not specified
compatibility: Not specified
findings.remediation: Add license and compatibility information to the YAML manifest to provide clarity on usage rights and supported environments.

findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

findings.title: Python code block executes shell commands
findings.description: Code block in SKILL.md at line 64 contains potentially dangerous Python code.
findings.remediation: Review the code block for security implications.

scan_metadata.llm_overall_assessment: The 'monorepo-navigator' skill has a medium risk due to over-broad capability claims without specifying tool restrictions, which could lead to misuse. Additionally, the absence of license and compatibility information is a minor issue that should be addressed. No critical or high-severity threats were identified.
